actions.script:
import org.moqui.agent.context.AgentContextUtil
def ctx = new AgentContextUtil().buildContext(ec) runtimeContext = ctx userId = ctx.userId username = ctx.username tenantId = ctx.tenantId activeOrgId = ctx.activeOrgId userOrgIds = ctx.userOrgIds locale = ctx.locale timezone = ctx.timezone permissionIdSet = ctx.permissionIdSet

String effectiveVisitId = visitId ?: sessionId ?: ec.user.visitId if (!effectiveVisitId) return ec.entity.find('moqui.agent.AgentSessionContext') .condition('visitId', effectiveVisitId) .condition('userId', ec.user.userId) .deleteAll()

import org.moqui.agent.AgentToolSupport
String actionEnumId = authzActionEnumId ?: 'AUTHZA_VIEW' resourceAccess = "${artifactTypeEnumId}:${actionEnumId}:${artifactName}" allowed = AgentToolSupport.checkArtifactAccess(ec, artifactTypeEnumId, actionEnumId, artifactName)

service.description: Composite tool: searches agent prompts, picks the top executable document, and executes it — all in one round-trip. Reduces LLM latency by eliminating the separate search → get → execute cycle.
Register an external AI/chat session. Stores only external context identifiers, never chat transcript.
Update external context fields of an existing agent session. Only updates the caller's own session unless ADMIN/MCP_DEBUG.

actions.script:
String userId = ec.user.userId Set userGroups = (ec.user.userGroupIdSet ?: []) as Set boolean isPrivileged = userGroups.contains('ADMIN') || userGroups.contains('MCP_DEBUG')
def sess = agentSessionContextId ? ec.entity.find('moqui.agent.AgentSessionContext').condition('agentSessionContextId', agentSessionContextId).one() : (sessionId ? ec.entity.find('moqui.agent.AgentSessionContext').condition('sessionId', sessionId).condition('userId', userId).one() : null) if (!sess) throw new IllegalArgumentException('AgentSessionContext not found') if (!isPrivileged && sess.userId != userId) throw new IllegalArgumentException('Not authorized to update this session')
Map updates = [lastUpdatedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp] if (clientSessionId != null) updates.clientSessionId = clientSessionId if (clientContextId != null) updates.clientContextId = clientContextId if (clientConversationId != null) updates.clientConversationId = clientConversationId if (clientUrl != null) updates.clientUrl = clientUrl if (providerSessionId != null) updates.providerSessionId = providerSessionId if (providerConversationId != null) updates.providerConversationId = providerConversationId if (providerThreadId != null) updates.providerThreadId = providerThreadId if (providerLastResponseId != null) updates.providerLastResponseId = providerLastResponseId if (modelName != null) updates.modelName = modelName if (statusId != null) updates.statusId = statusId updates.lastActivityDate = ec.user.nowTimestamp sess.setAll(updates) sess.update() agentSessionContext = sess.getMap()

service.description: List agent sessions for the current user. ADMIN/MCP_DEBUG can see all sessions.
Close an agent session. Only closes the caller's own session unless ADMIN/MCP_DEBUG.

actions.script:
String userId = ec.user.userId Set userGroups = (ec.user.userGroupIdSet ?: []) as Set boolean isPrivileged = userGroups.contains('ADMIN') || userGroups.contains('MCP_DEBUG')
def sess = agentSessionContextId ? ec.entity.find('moqui.agent.AgentSessionContext').condition('agentSessionContextId', agentSessionContextId).one() : (sessionId ? ec.entity.find('moqui.agent.AgentSessionContext').condition('sessionId', sessionId).condition('userId', userId).one() : null) if (!sess) throw new IllegalArgumentException('AgentSessionContext not found') if (!isPrivileged && sess.userId != userId) throw new IllegalArgumentException('Not authorized to close this session')
sess.setAll([statusId: 'AgSessClosed', lastUpdatedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]) sess.lastActivityDate = ec.user.nowTimestamp sess.update() agentSessionContext = sess.getMap()
